summary: Correct fix for the ceiling-division page count. The change is right; it lacks a regression test for the remainder case.

findings.title: Correct ceiling-division fix
findings.detail: Switching to (total + per_page - 1) // per_page fixes the dropped final page.

findings.title: Add a test for the partial-final-page case
findings.detail: There is no test asserting page_count(10, 3) == 4; without it this regression can return.
findings.suggestion: Add a test covering a total that is not a multiple of per_page.
